_readme: Custom model configuration: pricing, context window, and more.
Copy this file to 'custom-models.json' and edit to your needs.
- Keys are model name prefixes (e.g. 'glm-4' matches 'glm-4.7')
- All prices are in USD per million tokens
- inputTokenPrice and outputTokenPrice are required for cost estimation
- cacheReadInputTokenPrice is optional (defaults to 10% of inputTokenPrice)
- cacheCreationInputTokenPrice is optional (defaults to 125% of inputTokenPrice)
- contextWindow is optional (max tokens for context window % metric)
- Entries here override built-in pricing/context window for the same model prefix
- Changes take effect on next page load (no restart needed)
